notation.name: position state
notation.meaning: Estimated position vector at epoch k.

notation.name: velocity state
notation.meaning: Estimated velocity vector at epoch k.

notation.name: attitude quaternion
notation.meaning: Unit quaternion representing spacecraft attitude at epoch k.

notation.name: clock bias
notation.meaning: Clock bias state term entering range-like measurements.

notation.name: clock drift
notation.meaning: Clock drift state term entering Doppler-like measurements.

notation.name: measurement vector
notation.meaning: Observation vector at epoch k.

notation.name: measurement function
notation.meaning: Predicted measurement mapping from state to observation space.

notation.name: innovation residual
notation.meaning: Difference between measured and predicted observation vectors.

notation.name: innovation covariance
notation.meaning: Covariance matrix of innovations used for normalization.

notation.name: measurement covariance
notation.meaning: Measurement noise covariance matrix.

notation.name: measurement Jacobian
notation.meaning: Linearized sensitivity matrix partial h/partial x.

notation.name: observability information matrix
notation.meaning: Fisher-information-style matrix H_k^T R_k^{-1} H_k used for geometry conditioning diagnostics.

notation.name: frame mismatch quaternion
notation.meaning: Quaternion difference between observation-derived and estimated attitude quaternions.

notation.name: frame mismatch angle
notation.meaning: Geodesic mismatch angle computed from q_delta.

notation.name: navigation coherence score
notation.meaning: Composite confidence score emitted by the WaveEngine Nav layer.

notation.name: residual component
notation.meaning: Score component derived from normalized innovations.

notation.name: frame component
notation.meaning: Score component derived from quaternionic frame residuals.

notation.name: clock component
notation.meaning: Score component indicating timing consistency and drift behavior.

notation.name: observability component
notation.meaning: Score component from geometry conditioning measures.

notation.name: dynamics component
notation.meaning: Score component for force-model and trajectory-consistency checks.

notation.name: body-frame line of sight
notation.meaning: Line-of-sight direction represented in the body frame.

notation.name: inertial line of sight
notation.meaning: Line-of-sight direction represented in an inertial frame.
